calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Payment Rights
Off Calendar May-03-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. MATT SCHERLING, TEL. NO. 1-510-560-5177 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
MR. T. BRUETT III, ALSO PRESENT IN COURT.

RULING - THE COURT ASKED MR. BRUETT IF HE UNDERSTOOD WHAT HE IS DOING AND WHAT HE IS RECEIVING IN TERMS OF INTEREST. MR. ABRUETT AGREES TO THE AMOUNT HE WILL BE RECEIVING. THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER J.G WENTWORTH ORIGINATIONS LLC'S Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Payment Rights between T. Bruett III is Granted. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189 =302/hk
